items.title: T.I. Reflects On ATL Legacy, Skating Bootcamp & Denzel Washington's Lessons During American Gangser
items.body_excerpt: Before ATL became a classic, T.I. was filming during the day, recording King at night, and trying to make both projects feel like they came from the same city. In this 7PM in Brooklyn cutdown, Tip looks back on why ATL connected across generations, the real skate boot camp that…

items.title: Lakers Q&A: How Does LA Land A Starting Forward? Summer League Impressions & More
items.body_excerpt: Jovan Buha discusses how the Los Angeles Lakers can add a starting forward, including their pathways, targets, and the importance of order of operations.
